name: @readable-ui/react
description: React bindings for readable-ui. Define components that render both HTML and Markdown.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/components.tsx --format esm --dts --clean --external react --external react/jsx-runtime
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/components.tsx --format esm --dts --watch --external react --external react/jsx-runtime
